description: A square designed 'LABOR NEWS' announcement card in DOL's branded template. Background photo shows a poultry processing line: a worker in a blue smock, hairnet, face mask and gloves bent over a stainless-steel line handling raw chicken pieces in an industrial plant. Overlaid is the small navy 'LABOR NEWS' tab and a bold white sans-serif headline on translucent navy ribbon blocks: 'US Department of Labor reaches agreement with Perdue Farms and SMX staffing agency to address child labor violations.' A navy bar at lower right reads 'dol.gov/newsroom.' This is a designed enforcement-announcement graphic (not a candid photo) about agreements with Perdue Farms and a staffing agency over employing children in hazardous occupations and after permitted hours in violation of the FLSA. Messaging technique: branded news-promo card framing the agency as enforcing child-labor protections at major food producers; audience is the general public, workers, and employers. Posted Jan 15 2025, before the Jan 20 inauguration, using the recurring DOL template.
notable_text: LABOR NEWS / US Department of Labor reaches agreement with Perdue Farms and SMX staffing agency to address child labor violations / dol.gov/newsroom
